mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_game_members(room_id, member_id, join_time) VALUES (#{id.roomId}, #{id.memberId}, #{joinTime})
INSERT INTO chat_game_members(room_id, member_id, join_time) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{memberId}, #{joinTime})
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM chat_game_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND member_id = #{memberId})

SELECT cm.room_id, u.user_id, u.username, u.avatar FROM chat_game_members cm LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON cm.member_id = u.user_id WHERE cm.room_id IN
#{roomId}
